meta.title: Task detail page (completed task — chenyubao2000 owner)
notes: Owner = chenyubao2000@163.com. Visiting same taskId as a different account returns 'No access' page (separate test target).
Login is plain password flow with E2E_TEST_EMAIL/PASSWORD in .env. SSO branch only triggers for @careerintlinc.com — out of scope for this baseline.

Existing coverage to NOT duplicate: task-cdp (input area + sidebar + user menu + sign-out + scenario suggestions on /task NEW), task-sidebar-cdp (sidebar More menu rename/delete), share-branch (share URL flow), view-all-files-prd (files drawer).

title.text: {dynamic, e.g. '2025年全球AI大模型市场研究任务'}

actions.note: Hidden until hovering task title; reveals inline edit input on click

actions.title: 查看此任务中所有文件
actions.note: ALREADY COVERED by view-all-files-prd — skip in this baseline

items.selector: [role='log'] button:has-text('查看此任务中所有文件')

completed-status.note: All 3 keys map to '任务已完成' in zh; orchestrator should pick chatbot.completed

header.i18nKey: NOT_FOUND_IN_MESSAGES — likely hardcoded; spec must use literal text or anchor on lucide-arrow-right

buttons.behavior: Click submits the suggestion text directly — log gets a new user-message; textarea is NOT pre-filled.
examples: 请生成 .docx 文档文件，详细研究摘要。
在生成的文件中添加市场趋势分析。
输出所有文件并确认生成完成。

S1-rename-input.name: Top-bar inline edit mode
S1-rename-input.note: Risk: this WRITES to backend. Test must restore original title via teardown OR use cloned task. Recommend skipping the actual save in regression and only testing reveal/cancel.

regions.description: 通过链接分享此会话给其他人

items.behavior: TBD — orchestrator should explore click effect

regions.note: Surprisingly minimal — only 1 menuitem. Confirms task-sidebar More menu (rename/delete/...) is a DIFFERENT menu, not duplicated here.

S4-credits-page.name: Credits button (only on /task NEW page, NOT on detail page)

creditsBtn.behavior: TBD — orchestrator click and observe (likely opens billing modal or navigates to /billing)
creditsBtn.anomaly: chenyubao2000 shows NEGATIVE credits (-57184). Possibly a backend bug — flag as @failing or open Linear issue.

edges.note: auto-submit, log gains a new user message; subsequent AI response is async
writes to clipboard; visual feedback may be transient toast

followup-suggestions.name: Recommended Follow-ups (推荐追问)
caseHints: TC-1 [smoke]: 已完成 task 详情页可见 '推荐追问' header + ≥1 个 follow-up button
TC-2: 每个 follow-up button 含 lucide-arrow-right 图标
TC-3 [P1]: 点击 follow-up button 自动 submit — log 内新增一条 user-message，文本与 button 文本一致
TC-4: textarea 不会被 fill（auto-submit 直接走 form）

rename-inline.name: Top-bar Inline Title Rename (pen-line)
caseHints: TC-1: hover task title → pen-line 按钮可见
TC-2: 点击 pen-line → input 替换 title StaticText
TC-3: 输入新文本 + Esc → 恢复原 title（不写后端，测试安全）
TC-4 [optional, gated]: 输入新文本 + Enter → 顶栏 + sidebar 都更新；teardown 恢复原 title

share-dialog.name: Top-bar Share Dialog
caseHints: TC-1 [smoke]: 点击 share2 → dialog '分享会话' 可见
TC-2: dialog 含 share URL，格式 /share/{taskId}?token=...
TC-3: 点击 '复制链接' → 剪贴板含 URL（用 evaluate_handle 读 navigator.clipboard）
TC-4: 点击 'Close' → dialog 关闭
TC-5 [destructive, gated]: 点击 '移除分享' → URL 失效（可放 @failing 或 skip）

more-menu.name: Top-bar More Menu (ellipsis)
caseHints: TC-1: 点击 ellipsis → menu role=menu 可见，含 '任务详情' menuitem
TC-2: 点击 '任务详情' → 后续行为待探索（orchestrator 在生成时自行 CDP 验证）

message-copy.name: Log Message Copy
caseHints: TC-1: log 内 user message 上有 '复制' button (含 lucide-copy 图标)
TC-2: 点击复制 → 剪贴板含 message 文本
TC-3 [optional]: AI message 上是否也有复制按钮（待验证）

credits-button.name: Top-bar Credits Counter
caseHints: TC-1: /task 新建任务页可见 Credits 按钮，文本匹配 /-?\d+\s*Credits/
TC-2: task 详情页该按钮被隐藏（regression）
TC-3 [@failing OR linear-bug]: chenyubao2000 显示负数 -57184 Credits — 数据异常，疑似计费 bug，需要产品确认是否为已知问题
